basic_details.job_title: CUTN Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Consultant, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Civil), Junior Engineer (Civil), Technical Assistant (Electrical), Technical Assistant (HVAC)
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) Consultant (Civil), Junior Engineer (Civil), Technical Assistant (Electrical), and Technical Assistant (HVAC) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of CUTN. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the CUTN Consultant (Civil), Junior Engineer (Civil), Technical Assistant (Electrical), and Technical Assistant (HVAC) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering, Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering, Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Electrical Engineering with C-License, Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Mechanical Engineering/Air Conditioning and Refrigeration
qualification.details: Consultant (Civil): First Class Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University with 20 years of Engineering experience or more and retired at the level of Executive Engineer/equivalent cadre (Pay Level 10 or 11) or above from Central/State Govt./PSU/Govt. autonomous bodies. Junior Engineer (Civil): Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University with one year relevant experience OR Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years experience in relevant field in Central PWD/State PWD or similar organizations/reputed Private construction company with annual turnover of Rs.200 crores. Technical Assistant (Electrical): Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University and C-License holder with one year relevant experience (like Operation and maintenance of 11 KV substation) OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering and C-License holder with three years experience in relevant field in Central PWD/State PWD or similar organizations/reputed Private construction company with annual turnover of Rs.200 crores. Technical Assistant (HVAC): Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University with one year relevant experience OR Diploma in Mechanical Engineering/Air Conditioner and Refrigeration with three years experience in relevant field in Central PWD/State PWD or similar organizations/reputed Private construction company with annual turnover of Rs.200 crores.

selection_process: Written Test (if required) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cutn.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUTN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Central University of Tamil Nadu recruitment is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CUTN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts including Consultant (Civil), Junior Engineer (Civil), Technical Assistant (Electrical), and Technical Assistant (HVAC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CUTN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 65 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Technical Assistant (Electrical) and Technical Assistant (HVAC) posts is Rs. 29,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for CUTN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for Junior Engineer (Civil)?
faq.answer: For Junior Engineer (Civil), a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering with one year of experience or a Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years of experience is required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CUTN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a Written Test (if required), followed by an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Central University of Tamil Nadu, which is www.cutn.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Central University of Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: The official website of Central University of Tamil Nadu is www.cutn.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
